summary: No ship: the code change is scoped, but the final release evidence is incomplete for the required original-repro proof.

findings.title: Missing verification: original repro output
findings.body: verification.md explicitly says there is no independent repro-gone check and substitutes the controller regression test for the original repro. The green verify-record also records repro as null, so the committed evidence does not show the original un-minimized repro no longer reproducing with actual command output. That violates the release-gate evidence contract and leaves the merge depending on a minimized regression test rather than the required repro proof.
findings.recommendation: Commit release verification that includes the original repro command and its green output at the reviewed final state, and update the verify-green record so repro evidence is non-null instead of relying on the regression suite as a substitute.
